# How Much Does Bankruptcy Cost? - Fee Breakdown [2026] - BK Cost
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> How much does bankruptcy cost in 2026? Attorney fees, court filing fees, credit counseling, and hidden costs for Chapter 7 and Chapter 13.

## About
howmuchdoesbankruptcycost.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.
